name: Alligator Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Cooked, peeled and deveined minced
1/4 teaspoon Paprika, salt & fresh ground oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a small, sharp knife, cut a 1.5-inch slit at the stem end on one side of each chili.
2. Scrape out seeds; do not tear stems. Rinse out chilies and drain on towels.
3. Mix the next nine ingredients in a bowl.
4. Season the filling with salt and pepper.
5. Spoon about 1 teaspoon into each chili (do not overstuff; chili should close).
6. Arrange chilies on a baking sheet. Refrigerate.
7. Heat 3/4 inch peanut oil in a heavy large skillet to 350 degrees.
8. Dredge each chili in the mixture, coating completely, and place in the skillet (in batches; do not crowd), frying until golden brown, turning once, about five minutes.
9. Drain on paper towels and serve.
Makes 36
From: TERRI ST.LOUIS Date: 05-10-93
